field.description: Data item to be used as `fields` input in `/factset-private-markets/v#/` endpoint.

name.description: Plain text name of the field.

category.description: Corresponding endpoint to input field item. For example, fields returning the category 'FINANCIALS' should be used in the /financials endpoint. The same follows data items falling in the category for NON_PERIODIC, which would be used in the /non-periodic endpoint.

factor.description: The factor for the field (e.g. 1000 = thousands).

sdfName.description: The name of the data item as it appears in the Standard Data Feed (SDF). A null value represents items available only in API.
